summary: Iteration 14 - Regression test after backend modularization (server.py refactored from 1686 to 772 lines). All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly. Backend modularization successful - core.py shared models/helpers work correctly.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 - minor Recharts sizing issue, does not affect functionality

GET /api/beats - list beats (public, no auth required)
GET /api/distributions/stores - returns 10 DSP stores (Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)
